---
title: "Simulation Results Summary"
author: "Erin M. Buchanan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## Libraries

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(magrittr)
```

## Shared Functions

```{r}
source("functions.R")
pilot_dir <- "simulations/pilot"
pilot_summary <- load_and_summarize_simulations(pilot_dir)
power_buckets <- c(80, 85, 90, 95)
```

## Pilot Figure Power Overall

```{r}
pilot_violin_data <- pilot_summary$overall_power %>%
  mutate(power_level = rep(c(70, 75, 80, 85, 90, 95), length(unique(pilot_summary$overall_power$run_id)))) %>% 
  filter(power_level > 79) %>% 
  mutate(corrected_sample_size = ifelse(corrected_sample_size < 20, 20, corrected_sample_size),
         power_level = as.factor(power_level))
  
ggplot(pilot_violin_data, aes(
  x = power_level,
  y = corrected_sample_size
)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "#d9e7ff", color = "#1f4e79", trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    x = "Power cutoff",
    y = "Suggested sample size",
    title = "Pilot sample size suggestions by power target"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(
  pilot_summary$overall_curve,
  aes(x = sample_size, y = percent_below)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.6, color = "#1f4e79") +
  labs(
    x = "Sample size",
    y = "Power",
    title = "Raw power curve by sample size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Pilot Figure Reliability Overall

```{r}
pilot_rel_violin_data <- pilot_summary$overall_rel 

ggplot(pilot_rel_violin_data, aes(x = sample_size, y = reliability_m)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.6, color = "#1f4e79") +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Reliability",
    title = "Pilot sample size suggestions by reliability target"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## POS Power Chart

```{r}
pilot_violin_data <- pilot_summary$pos_power %>%
  mutate(group = as.factor(group),
         power_level = rep(c(70, 75, 80, 85, 90, 95), length.out = nrow(.))
  ) %>% 
  filter(power_level > 79) %>% 
  mutate(corrected_sample_size = ifelse(corrected_sample_size < 20, 20, corrected_sample_size),
         power_level = as.factor(power_level)) %>% 
  filter(power_level == "80")
  
ggplot(pilot_violin_data, aes(
  x = group,
  y = corrected_sample_size
)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "#d9e7ff", color = "#1f4e79", trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    x = "Power cutoff",
    y = "Suggested sample size",
    title = "Pilot sample size suggestions by part of speech"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(pilot_summary$pos_curve, aes(x = sample_size, y = percent_below, color = group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample size",
    y = "Power",
    color = "Group",
    title = "POS power curve by sample size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## POS Reliability Chart

```{r}
pos_rel_data <- pilot_summary$pos_rel %>%
  mutate(group = as.factor(group))

ggplot(pos_rel_data, aes(x = sample_size, y = reliability_m, color = group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample size",
    y = "Reliability",
    color = "Group",
    title = "POS reliability by sample size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


## Length Power Chart

```{r}
pilot_violin_data <- pilot_summary$length_power %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = c("3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "10", "11+")),
         power_level = rep(c(70, 75, 80, 85, 90, 95), length.out = nrow(.)),
  ) %>% 
  filter(power_level > 79) %>% 
  mutate(corrected_sample_size = ifelse(corrected_sample_size < 20, 20, corrected_sample_size),
         power_level = as.factor(power_level)) %>% 
  filter(power_level == "80") 
  
ggplot(pilot_violin_data, aes(
  x = group,
  y = corrected_sample_size
)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "#d9e7ff", color = "#1f4e79", trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    x = "Power cutoff",
    y = "Suggested sample size",
    title = "Pilot sample size suggestions by length"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(pilot_summary$length_curve %>% 
         mutate(group = factor(group, levels = c("3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "10", "11+"))), aes(x = sample_size, y = percent_below, color = group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample size",
    y = "Power",
    color = "Group",
    title = "POS power curve by sample size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Length Reliability Chart

```{r}
length_rel_data <- pilot_summary$length_rel %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = c("3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "10", "11+")))

ggplot(length_rel_data, aes(x = sample_size, y = reliability_m, color = group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample size",
    y = "Reliability",
    color = "Group",
    title = "Length reliability by sample size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
